commands.description: List all tasks
Add a new task with a timestamp. Example: /addtask Buy groceries tomorrow at 5pm
Delete a task by ID. Example: /deletetask 1
Add a recurring routine. Example: /addroutine Take medication every day at 8am
List all routines
Delete a routine by ID. Example: /deleteroutine 1
Start Google Calendar OAuth and get a clickable auth link
List upcoming calendar events. Example: /listcalendar 7 10
Add a calendar event. Example: /addcalendarevent Team sync | 2026-04-25T14:00:00Z | 2026-04-25T14:30:00Z | Weekly check-in
Delete a calendar event by ID. Example: /deletecalendarevent 123abc
Add a new note. Example: /addnote Remember to call mom
List all notes
Delete a note by ID. Example: /deletenote 1
List all available tools
Read the current identity information
Update the entire identity information
Get the current model being used
Get the content of the README.md file
Answer a pending human task. Example: /answer 3 yes, continue with option A
List pending human guidance tasks
Add a URL or domain to the internet whitelist. Example: /whitelist https://example.com
Remove a URL or domain from the internet whitelist. Example: /blacklist https://example.com
List all domains in the whitelist
List all available commands
Check internet connectivity and show Cloudflare trace diagnostics
Run git pull, update Python dependencies, and restart if needed
Restart the system
